---
name: Plugin / task request
about: Propose a new task model or plugin for maatml
title: "[plugin] "
labels: ["plugin"]
assignees: []
---

## Task name

Proposed folder name under `examples/` (e.g. `my-task`).

## Problem / use case

What does this model do, and who needs it?

## Architecture sketch

Preferred architecture if known (`causal_sft`, `seq2seq`, `multi_head_classifier`, `dpo`/`orpo`, `vision_multitask`, `vlm_sft`, or new):

Base model ideas (optional):

## Input / output contract

- Input:
- Output schema (fields / enums):
- Validator layers needed (if any):

## Data plan

Where seed / training data would come from (synthetic builder, public corpus, etc.).

## Additional context

Related issues, prior art, or willingness to contribute an implementation.
